title: Anchorage Picnic – Address Correction
summary: The flyer we sent out about the Anchorage Shareholder Picnic on July 17th had an incorrect address. The correct address is 9401 W. Raspberry Road. Please call us at 907-486-2503 if you have any questions. See you there at noon on the 17th! Source

title: Student Highlight: Alexander Weyiouanna
summary: Alexander Weyiouanna from Shishmaref realized that in Alaska, he has a lot of opportunities to move in the direction he wants his life to go. title: Pilgrim Hot Springs Hours of Operation
summary: Effective immediately, Pilgrim Hot Springs will have the following hours of operation for the remainder of the summer season: Open 10:00 a.m. – 10:00 p.m. for day pass visitors. Closed on Tuesdays. (The pool and property will be reserved for overnight guests only after 10:00 p.m.) Pilgrim Hot Spring...

title: Upcoming SNC Board Meetings
summary: Interested in participating during Shareholder Comments? Please contact our Shareholder Department by phone in Nome at 907.387.1200 or in Anchorage at 907.929.7000, or email: shareholder@snc.org . The post Upcoming SNC Board Meetings appeared first on Sitnasuak Native Corporation .
